headline: 22 buys to get the party started
summary: Everything you need to celebrate in style
body_text:
Kelly Wearstler Rotganzen Cracked Actor disco bowl, $16,000

Tom Dixon stainless-steel Bell table lamp, £240, harrods.com

Los Encajeros linen Valver cocktail napkins, £58 for set of six, modesens.com

Veuve Clicquot Brut magnum, £105, fenwick.co.uk

Bulgari Hotel x Yinka Ilori linen napkins, £180 for set of four

Tiffany & Co handmade, mouth-blown Venetian glass and gold-leaf Elsa Peretti Bone cake plate, £520

Colville steel candle holders, £590 for set of two, matchesfashion.com

Leica Sofort 2 camera, £350

Theo Fennell silver Gordon’s gin sleeve, £5,500

Guess Zebra candle, £110

Georg Jensen stainless-steel cutlery, £278 for set of 24, selfridges.com

Ichendorf Milano borosilicate-glass Travasi glasses and bowl by Astrid Luglio, £92 for set of three, frankbros.com

Christina Lundsteen checkerboard cotton-velvet Hennie cushion, €168

Dinosaur Designs resin-stone servers, £100

Paul Smith 1kg Botanist scented candle, £225

Maison Pichon Uzès earthenware Louis XVI side plates, £186
